docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHIDHIR, KAMIRAN AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-24-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2010 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,193.58 FILED BY KHIDHIR, KAMIRAN AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHIDHIR, KAMIRAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION ALTHOUGH PLAINTIFF WAS THE VICTIM OF AN INTERNET FRAUD, THE EVIDENCE WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT WESTERN UNION FAILED TO TAKE ADEQUATE STEPS FOR RELEASE OF THE WIRED FUNDS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
